creator: Kunlin_Cheng@wistron.com
text:
Install FreeBSD can show error message with config 256G DIMM.
The error message show error code 0.


message:

Add of package nl-freebsd-doc-20110110 aborted, error code 0 - Please check the debug screen for more info.

Fix: 

If use 240G DIMM can Install, and install FreeBSD 9.0 can Pass.
How-To-Repeat: 1.Config 256 DIMM.
2.Boot into CD/DVD.
3.Install FreeBSD.
